title: La Bouloumbele
description:
Custom minecraft modpack for the Bouloumbele group.

Updates annually.
body:
# About
The modpack evolves as people in our community wanted to discover mods. Things started from vanilla to more heavily modded iteration.

## Version 1
A simple Vanilla+ modpack that adds small improvements and tweaks to enhance the base game. It includes quality-of-life features, performance optimizations, updated structures and minor gameplay adjustments, all while keeping the original Minecraft experience relatively intact.

Uses the [Fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack to boost performances.

## Version 2
Codenamed: Here we go again

Heavy orientation with the Create mod based on the [All of Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/aoc) modpack as a base for compatibility
